sigWerErrors.reason: 'Shoot' is an interjection at the start and does not affect the meaning of the main sentence.
One repetition of 'hold on' is missing, but the overall meaning and intent are unchanged.
'It is got to be annoying' vs 'that is got to be annoying'—minor grammatical difference, meaning is preserved.
'All right' vs 'alright'—these are equivalent in meaning, just different forms.
